label: Synthetic B1-type — B2C e-commerce, product retail

meta.description: Online store specialising in premium handcrafted and Montessori-inspired wooden toys and educational games for children aged 0–8. Sells primarily through own website with growing Instagram presence. Products sourced from local Austrian and German workshops.

previous_ai_attempts: Klaviyo automated email sequences for abandoned cart
Instagram auto-reply for common DM questions (basic keyword trigger)

data_availability.data_quality_overall: MEDIUM — order history reliable, no customer lifetime value tracking, no return log

processes.name: Instagram DM to Purchase
steps: Parent sends DM asking about age suitability or gifting advice
Founder responds manually with product suggestions
Redirected to website checkout or PayPal link
Confirmation email sent automatically via Shopify
Order shipped via Österreichische Post or DPD

bottlenecks.description: All gifting advice and age-suitability questions answered manually, one by one
bottlenecks.time_impact: 1.5–2 hours per day of founder time during peak season

bottlenecks.description: No structured follow-up for customers who ask but do not buy
bottlenecks.time_impact: Estimated 20–30% of interested leads lost with no follow-up

processes.data_available_for_process: Shopify order history (640 orders). No DM conversation logs.

processes.name: Seasonal Campaign Management
steps: Plan seasonal content calendar (Christmas, Easter, Back to School)
Write product descriptions and social captions
Schedule posts and email campaign in Klaviyo
Monitor performance and respond to comments

bottlenecks.description: Entire content pipeline handled by one person — writing, design, scheduling

processes.data_available_for_process: Klaviyo email metrics available but not exported.
